assessment.focus_note: The geopolitical situation concerning Iran and the US remains highly volatile, with critical information regarding cyberattacks and potential military actions circulating. Domestic political narratives around Trump's policies and persona are also highly contested. It is crucial to continue deeply processing available information, even when digest content is repetitive, to identify underlying trends and verify claims.
